title: telemetry — subscribed events
description: Listeners for all three signals. Registry compilation runs once at boot. TenantResolved fanout writes both to the OTel context (baggage + span attributes) AND to RequestContext (for log records).

listeners.purpose: Discover every #[AsSpan] / #[AsCounter] / #[AsHistogram] / #[AsGauge] / #[AsUpDownCounter] / #[AsContext] / #[AsBaggage] attribute across the codebase. Compile into SpanRegistry + MetricRegistry. Register each instrument with the OTel Meter.
Discover every #[AsLogContext] / #[AsLogChannel] / #[RedactedForLogs] attribute across the codebase. Compile into LogContextRegistry indexed by declaring class.
Ensures the root span is closed + flushed even if the request short-circuited (e.g. auth failure).
Once TenantResolver identifies the tenant, adds academorix.tenant_id to current-span attributes + baggage.
Store tenant_id in RequestContext so AcademorixContextProcessor picks it up on subsequent Log:: calls.
Extracts the trace context from the job payload + starts a consumer span linked to the producer.
Restore RequestContext from job payload. Ensures logs inside async jobs carry the originating tenant_id + causer_id.
Closes the consumer span + records success/failure status.
Records the exception on the consumer span, sets status=ERROR.

bus_middleware.purpose: On job dispatch, serialises the current trace context + baggage + RequestContext into the job payload. Registered globally via config('queue.middleware'). Companion to ResumeQueueTrace + PropagateContextIntoJob.
